trace.title: Guard restored — the same check now passes
trace.subtitle: I put the distinct-approvers guard back. The gate re-explored every reachable state and could not reach execute() with one approver.

callout.title: No reachable path drives this order to execute().
callout.body: The redelivered approval is de-duplicated by principal, so the second approve(Bob) does not advance the order. execute() stays unreachable until a second distinct approver acts.
